chain.thought:
Filter out useless columns.

The question is asking which conference has the most number of bids. Since there is a "# of bids" column with numerical data, we need to sort the data using the f_sort_column(# of bids) operation with the order "large to small" to see which conference has the highest number of bids.

The Southeastern conference has the most number of bids with 6. The next highest conferences are Big Ten and Pacific-10, each with 5 bids, but Southeastern still tops the list. Therefore, the conference with the most bids is Southeastern.
